bug_summary: The Anthropic provider built its extended-thinking request in the legacy `thinking: {type: "enabled", budget_tokens}` wire shape, which returns HTTP 400 on current Claude models (e.g. claude-opus-4-8) and, where accepted, omits the `display: "summarized"` field so thinking blocks come back with empty text.

cases.title: Anthropic apply_thinking sends removed `type:enabled`+budget_tokens shape (400, empty reasoning)
cases.instructions: Review this diff. Return only the JSON object requested by the system prompt.

cases.title: Request builder uses deprecated `type:enabled` thinking field and omits the display flag
cases.instructions: Review this diff. Return only the JSON object requested by the system prompt.
